validation_method: Playwright route load plus Pillow dimensions/RGB extrema check; expected page text is recorded per screenshot.

screenshots.title: Discover dashboard
screenshots.description: Starting workspace with navigation into ATT&CK exploration, AI analysis, comparisons, sector intelligence, and operational modules.

screenshots.title: ATT&CK Navigator matrix
screenshots.description: Interactive ATT&CK/ATLAS matrix for technique review, layer selection, and evidence-driven navigation.

screenshots.title: ATT&CK Group Library
screenshots.description: Actor and campaign library with ATT&CK relationships, source-backed group context, and pivots into overlays.

screenshots.title: AI Analysis
screenshots.description: Report ingestion surface for pasted text, PDF/DOCX/TXT uploads, provider selection, and mapping extraction.

screenshots.title: Compare reports and layers
screenshots.description: Comparison workspace for TTP overlap, similarity scoring, and detection-gap review across reports or layers.

screenshots.title: Group vs Group comparison
screenshots.description: Group-to-group behavior comparison for overlap, distinctive techniques, and shared tactics.

screenshots.title: Sector Intelligence
screenshots.description: Sector intelligence ranking that connects sectors, regions, technologies, actors, and evidence.

screenshots.title: RetroHunt
screenshots.description: Retrohunt workspace for searching historical indicators, techniques, and evidence across local intelligence.

screenshots.title: Knowledge Library
screenshots.description: Knowledge library for saved reports, references, entities, and investigation source material.

screenshots.title: IOC Library
screenshots.description: IOC library for stored observables, source attribution, TTP links, actor links, and enrichment metadata.

screenshots.title: IOC Investigation
screenshots.description: IOC investigation pivot workspace for IPs, domains, URLs, hashes, reputation, relationships, and timeline evidence.

screenshots.title: VirusTotal Lookup
screenshots.description: VirusTotal lookup page for on-demand hash/domain/IP/URL enrichment when an API key is configured.

screenshots.title: Feeds Management
screenshots.description: Feed management page for ATT&CK/ATLAS sync, IOC sources, custom feeds, OpenCTI, STIX/TAXII, Sigma/YARA, and sandbox feeds.

screenshots.title: Investigation report
screenshots.description: Report generation workspace for investigation summaries, exported evidence, and analyst handoff.

screenshots.title: Operations
screenshots.description: Operations view for platform tasks, source refreshes, background jobs, and controlled workflow actions.

screenshots.title: Pipeline imports
screenshots.description: Pipeline import workspace for STIX/TAXII, MISP JSON, custom feeds, detection content, and data-source onboarding.

screenshots.title: DFIR Examples
screenshots.description: DFIR examples page that provides sample workflows and public report material for demonstrations.

screenshots.title: Troubleshooting
screenshots.description: Troubleshooting page for deployment health, self-test output, Docker/API guidance, and recovery steps.

screenshots.title: Sector packs
screenshots.description: Sector pack workspace for packaged sector context, actor relevance, and reusable intelligence bundles.

screenshots.title: IOC node detail
screenshots.description: IOC node detail view for graph-oriented observable context and pivots.
